title: Server Pages are not Displayed Correctly
breadcrumbs: Server Pages are not Displayed Correctly
text: Server Pages are not Displayed Correctly Depending on the specific page display error symptom, here are some possible causes and resolutions. Symptom: Page has not refreshed, or appears to have not refreshed. Possible cause Resolution Page in cache. Select Ctrl+F5 (Ctrl+Refresh). Server Page not (correctly) compiled. Compile the Server Page and check whether errors occur. Server Page not loaded by the Uniface Server. Resolution: In the [SETTINGS] section in the Server assignment file, set $TEST_MODE_COMPONENTS . Symptom: Parts of the page, such as styles and images, are not displayed. Possible cause Resolution Relative paths used in the skeletons (for example, ../css /applic.css ) cannot be translated into absolute paths. Check whether virtual directory specified in WWW publishing service is identical to path specified in WEBAPPURL setting in URD Servlet Alias. Symptom: Controls are not displayed when the page is submitted after a button is pressed. Possible cause Resolution Non-database fields have an initial value. Set Is Static property to True . Symptom: Extra occurrence is displayed in browser after pressing button. Possible cause Resolution Server Page is intended to display one occurrence, but synchronization results in extra occurrence. Change Database Behavior to Record . Possible cause: Server Page is intended to display one occurrence, but synchronization results in extra occurrence. Resolution: Change Database Behavior to Record . Related Links Data Access Determines the degree to which data in the component can be edited and stored. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
